Workspaces.bookingsSubtitle: Accurate to the cent, balanced, and immutable after posting.
Workspaces.postingSaved: The transaction has been posted. Corrections must be made through a traceable reversal.
Workspaces.noBookingsHelp: The first posted transaction will appear here with its sequential number.
Workspaces.bookingsLoadFailed: Booking data could not be loaded.
Workspaces.noDocumentsHelp: Click or drag PDFs into this window to get started.
Workspaces.noSelectedDocumentsHelp: You can post without a document, or select one or more documents above.
Workspaces.dropDocumentsHelp: PDF files will be uploaded and selected immediately.
Workspaces.pdfOnly: Please select at least one PDF file.
Workspaces.documentUploadFailed: The document could not be uploaded.
Workspaces.resizeColumns: Resize document preview and posting columns
Workspaces.exportImportSubtitle: Exchange accounting data securely with external systems.
Workspaces.accountingImportHelp: Select a complete DATEV EXTF folder or a Lexware Buchhaltung “Daten Betriebsprüfung” folder. The format and all included fiscal years are detected automatically.
Workspaces.accountingImportSucceeded: Processed {imported} bookings, {accounts} accounts, and {documents} documents for {years}; skipped {skipped} existing bookings.
Workspaces.annualCloseSubtitle: Automated statements, clear blockers, and deliberate professional approval.
Workspaces.professionalReviewNote: Balance equality, income result, and taxonomy mappings have been checked. Inventory, valuation, provisions, tax reconciliation, and any notes still require professional confirmation.
Workspaces.closeConfirm: Lock fiscal year {year}? Afterwards, corrections are only possible as traceable entries in an open period.
Workspaces.journalComplete: All transactions are balanced and posted.
Workspaces.statementsBalanced: Balance equality and income calculation agree.
Workspaces.yearImmutable: The fiscal year is immutably locked.
Workspaces.eBalanceSubtitle: Account mapping, official ERiC validation, and submission with taxonomy 6.9.
Workspaces.mappingCount: {mapped} of {total} valued general-ledger accounts are mapped to a taxonomy position.
Workspaces.submissionConfirmation: I confirm the binding submission of this closed fiscal year.
Workspaces.ericValid: ERiC validated the dataset without errors.
Workspaces.ericSubmitted: ELSTER accepted the encrypted submission; the protocol was archived.
Workspaces.ericBoundary: ERiC validates and submits the technical dataset. Inventory, valuations, provisions, tax elections, signature, and professional approval remain the responsibility of the accountable person or tax adviser.
Workspaces.eBalanceLoadFailed: E-Balance data could not be loaded.
